name: Noivern - Unexpected Issues.
description:
This bat Pokémon in your team has always been a timid lil guy, but boy is he something while fighting! He even carried your whole team several times, making him stronger, but he's still the same shy bat you've always known. Though today, he woke up with a.. throbbing issue.

  • Art credits to »ravan on e6.

I love this guy!! he's in my team in pokemon scarlet. This 'mon deserves much more love and appreciation fr..

i love this bat. Nsfw scenario guhh
